headlines: Moody’s gives first rating to a $100M Bitcoin‑backed municipal bond
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs posted their first positive month in 2026 (March) — trackers show ~$1.3B–$2.5B inflows
Hong Kong misses its March target for first stablecoin issuer licenses
Stablecoin‑yield compromise still stalled — threatens progress on the CLARITY Act
Ethereum faces price risk as ETH ETFs continued outflows in March, per trackers and analysts’ charts

articles.title: Moody’s gives first rating to a $100M Bitcoin‑backed municipal bond
articles.summary: Moody’s Investors Service assigned a provisional Ba2 rating to New Hampshire’s $100M Bitcoin‑backed revenue bonds — a first for a US public finance deal backed directly by BTC collateral. The move could open a path for more crypto‑backed structured finance, but Moody’s stressed the deal’s speculative risk because of Bitcoin volatility.

articles.title: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs end March with net inflows — trackers differ on the total
articles.summary: Data trackers show U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs reversed recent outflows in March, recording roughly $1.3B (SoSoValue) to as much as $2.5B (other trackers) in monthly net inflows — the first positive month after several months of withdrawals.

articles.title: Hong Kong delays rollout of its first stablecoin issuer licences
articles.summary: Hong Kong’s HKMA missed its self‑set March deadline to issue the first batch of HKD‑stablecoin licences. Regulators say they are still reviewing applications and tightening compliance checks before approvals.

articles.title: Stablecoin yield text remains unresolved — Senate bill could be delayed
articles.summary: A compromise on stablecoin 'yield' language in the CLARITY Act is still unsettled. Coinbase and other industry players have pushed back on draft language, raising the risk that the Senate markup and a final crypto market‑structure vote will be delayed.

articles.title: ETH under pressure: ETF outflows and a technical risk pattern
articles.summary: Ethereum hit near‑term selling pressure as spot ETH ETF products posted another month of outflows in March, and chart patterns (head‑and‑shoulders) point to downside risk that traders are watching closely.

articles.title: Bitget lists Mezo (MEZO) and launches Launchpool campaign
articles.summary: Exchange Bitget added Mezo (MEZO) to its Launchpool and opened spot trading for MEZO/USDT on April 1, with token rewards and pool campaigns active for early participants.

articles.title: Ant Group buys stake in Hong Kong broker as banks position for stablecoin licences
articles.summary: Ant Group acquired a majority stake in Hong Kong broker Yau Choy, a move industry observers say positions the company to pursue a local stablecoin licence once regulators complete reviews.

articles.title: Solana ETFs: institutional flows remain a bright spot amid price weakness
articles.summary: Institutional Solana ETF products have continued to attract flows in recent weeks, pushing cumulative Solana ETF assets toward meaningful levels even as SOL’s price lags — a sign some institutions keep buying the protocol despite marketwide weakness.
